title: Unsure how to approach CS50? Carter Zenke answers.
summary: CS50 is Harvard University's foundational computer science course available through edX, Harvard Extension School, Harvard Summer School, and OpenCourseWare. The course is led by David J. Malan and maintains active communities across multiple social media and collaboration platforms including Discord, GitHub, and Stack Exchange.
writeup: CS50 instructor Carter Zenke addresses how to approach Harvard's foundational computer science course. The video notes that CS50 is available through edX, Harvard Extension School, Harvard Summer School, and OpenCourseWare, and that the course is led by David J. Malan. It also points to active communities across platforms including Discord, GitHub, and Stack Exchange.
